title: Fakename(unofficial)
description: After installing the mod, you can easily change your display name in the game. The change will only apply to the world/server, so the modification does not permanently change your nickname.To change your name, simply enter the command /fakename set --
body:
![The author's logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7823bc637266d9998a2a76158a20e733d47ea71d_0.webp)

After installing the mod, you can easily change your display name in the game. The change will only apply to the world/server, so the modification does not permanently change your nickname.

 To change your name, simply enter the command /fakename set --



this is an unofficial update, I just needed this mod on my new Forge, so I updated it to make it work well and decided to share it.

 I'm not the author of this mod, I just slightly modified it.
![my logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21b9452415acd410f6d5fba1bc07080cb61886ed_0.webp)
